zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Margaretha Lossen於1687年7月13日出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特貝福隆根賀斯特爾時，她的父親Arnoldus Losse41歲，母親Catharina Schroder34歲。她於1705年10月11日與Andreas Michaels在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1722年9月26日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Margaretha Lossen于1687年7月13日出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特貝福隆根賀斯特爾时，她的父亲Arnoldus Losse41岁，母亲Catharina Schroder34岁。她于1705年10月11日与Andreas Michaels在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1722年9月26日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lossen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from   Vos   2, found mainly in the border area of Limburg in the Netherlands and Westphalia in Germany.

variants.name: Vos
meanings: Dutch: nickname from vos ‘fox’, typically used for a redhead, but also found with other senses, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word. This surname is also found in South Africa. Compare Devos .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Margaretha Lossen was born on 13 July 1687, in Herstelle, Beverungen, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Arnoldus Losse, was 41 and her mother, Catharina Schroder, was 34. She married Andreas Michaels on 11 October 1705, in Herstelle, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 26 September 1722, in Herstelle, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 35.

Elle a épousé Andreas Michaels le 11 octobre 1705, à Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 septembre 1722, à Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Lossenが1687年7月13日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターベバーウンジェンハーステルで生まれた時，父Arnoldus Losseは41歳，母Catharina Schroderは34歳であった。1705年10月11日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターハーステルでAndreas Michaelsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1722年9月26日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターハーステルで35歳で死去した。

ko.Herstelle, Beverungen, Höxter, Nordrhein: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 비베런겐 허스텔
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Lossen(이)가 1687년 7월 13일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 비베런겐 허스텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoldus Losse(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catharina Schroder(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1705년 10월 11일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 허스텔에서 Andreas Michaels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1722년 9월 26일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 허스텔에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Margaretha Lossen родилась 13 июля 1687 г. в местности хирстелл, бивирунген, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Arnoldus Losse было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Catharina Schroder, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andreas Michaels 11 октября 1705 г. в местности хирстелл, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 сентября 1722 г. в местности хирстелл, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 35 лет.
